commit.name: Weather Card
commit.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
commit.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

issues.description: Redundant/broken implementation: The entrypoint points to components/index.tsx, which tries to import sub-components that are not defined in the exports or the same file, while files like ForecastStrip.tsx redefine MainView instead of acting as specific sub-components.
issues.fix: Correct the component architecture so that index.tsx correctly imports properly named sub-components (WeatherHeader, WeatherDetails, ForecastStrip) instead of having multiple files declaring conflicting MainView exports.

issues.description: Inconsistent structure: File system includes components that declare 'MainView' repeatedly and import unused heavy dependencies. The logic flow is fragmented.
issues.fix: Consolidate into a clean component tree: Entrypoint -> Main (container) -> Header/Body/Footer sub-components. Remove duplicate imports and unnecessary component definitions.

issues.description: Hardcoded values: While CSS variables are used in some places, some padding and spacing attributes in the provided components still use raw numbers instead of design system variables.
issues.fix: Replace numeric spacing values (e.g., 24, 16) with proper design system spacing tokens.

evaluations.critique: The component structure is fundamentally broken due to circular references and fragmented definitions of 'MainView' across multiple files. While the individual visual logic looks promising, the actual compilation would fail because the component tree is not correctly wired and relies on non-existent imports within the component structure.

commit.name: Interactive Periodic Table
commit.description: CSS Grid periodic table with category coloring, search, and detail panel
commit.prompt:
Build an interactive periodic table of elements.

Layout:
- CSS Grid: 18 columns. Place each element using gridRow and gridColumn from its data.
- Each cell: symbol (large, centered), atomic number (small, top-left)
- Color-code by category using design tokens (e.g., noble-gas → one color, halogen → another)
- Search input at top — filters by name or symbol (case-insensitive)
- Click an element → detail panel below grid shows: name, symbol, atomicNumber, atomicWeight, category
- Legend showing each category with its color

All element data comes from props.elements. Use design system CSS variables.

commit.name: Onboarding Wizard
commit.description: Multi-step onboarding flow with step indicator and validation
commit.prompt:
Build a 3-step onboarding wizard. Steps:

Step 1 - Profile Setup:
- Name input (required)
- Email input (required, validate email format)
- Avatar selection (choose from 4 emoji avatars)

Step 2 - Preferences:
- Role selection (dropdown: Developer, Designer, Manager, Other)
- Notification toggle (email notifications on/off)
- Theme preference (light/dark toggle)

Step 3 - Review & Confirm:
- Summary of all selections from steps 1-2
- "Go Back" button to edit
- "Complete Setup" button to submit

Requirements:
- Step indicator at top showing current step (1/2/3) with progress bar
- Back/Next navigation (Next disabled until required fields valid)
- Smooth transition between steps
- Call props.onComplete with all collected data on final submit
- All initial values from props (for editing existing profile)
- Use design system CSS variables for all styling

initialProfile.description: Pre-filled profile data for editing (all fields optional)

avatarOptions.description: Available avatar emojis to choose from

roleOptions.description: Available role options for the dropdown

complete.label: Complete Setup
complete.description: Called with all profile data when user completes onboarding

issues.description: The component is fragmented into multiple files with conflicting implementations of the MainView. The logic is incomplete, missing the theme toggle and the required review summary details.
issues.fix: Consolidate into a single entry file; implement the missing theme toggle and the full object property display in the review step.

issues.description: Multiple redundant 'MainView' functions are defined across different files, making the component non-functional as it doesn't know which entry point to use. File structure is chaotic.
issues.fix: Remove redundant MainView definitions and unify the component structure into one clean file.

issues.description: Inconsistent use of CSS variables vs hardcoded numeric values in padding/gap properties (e.g., 'padding={24}' instead of 'var(--ggui-spacing-6)').
issues.fix: Standardize all spacing and sizing to use the design token system variables.

issues.description: The current step navigation and progress indicator lack semantic ARIA labeling. Review summary is just a text string.
issues.fix: Add aria-live regions for step transitions and a semantic list or definition list for the review summary.

evaluations.critique: The code is heavily fragmented with redundant component definitions and incomplete logic across files, preventing a cohesive render. While the hook structure is a good start, the UI implementation is currently broken due to conflicting file contents and missing features like the theme toggle.
